mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_sessions WHERE id = #{id} AND created_by = #{createdBy}
SELECT * FROM chat_sessions ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_sessions WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_sessions (title, mode, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{mode}, #{createdBy}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{updatedAt}, NOW()))
